Declare a feature schema

nf_feature.Rd

Declare a feature schema

Usage

nf_feature(logical, encodings, nullable = FALSE, description = NULL)

Arguments

logical

An nf_logical_schema object.

encodings

A list of encoding objects created by nf_ref_encoding() or nf_columns_encoding().

nullable

Whether missing values are permitted. Default FALSE.

description

Optional description.

Value

An nf_feature object.

On this page
